nodes.label: GAME mode (per-question timer, speed points, streaks)
nodes.norm_label: game mode (per-question timer, speed points, streaks)

nodes.label: Subscriptions / plans (manual activation)
nodes.rationale: No payment integration — an admin manually activates orgs and sets seat limits; approving a tutor request mints an ACTIVE subscription (SubscriptionSource ADMIN).

nodes.label: Multi-tenant isolation
nodes.rationale: Every content/assessment query is scoped centrally by role + ACTIVE membership; a deactivated learner loses content access immediately on the existing session (not at JWT expiry).

nodes.label: Usage-limit UX & subscription promotion modal
nodes.rationale: A single app-wide promotion modal surfaces consistently whenever a self-serve usage limit is hit, instead of each call site failing silently or with ad-hoc text; the hard 120 MB cap (FILE_TOO_LARGE) and tenant-owner / already-top-plan limits show an inline message because upgrading would not lift them.

nodes.label: contentAccess.service.ts isolation guard (assertCanAccessContent)
nodes.rationale: Central guard (resolveTenantIdForUser, buildContentListWhere, assertCanAccessContent, assertCanMutateContent, assertTenantOwnsContent) keying on a ContentAssignment for this learner plus active membership — same-tenant-unassigned and cross-boundary both 404 with no existence leak.

nodes.label: classifyLimitError / useLimitErrorHandler decision logic
nodes.rationale: Chooses modal vs inline message by role + upgradePlanCode: self-serve INDIVIDUAL quota/plan-file limit → global modal; tenant-owner, already-top-plan, hard 120 MB cap, inactive subs, learner blocks → inline localized message.

nodes.label: Quota error contract (402 QUOTA_EXCEEDED / 413 PLAN_FILE_LIMIT / 413 FILE_TOO_LARGE)
nodes.rationale: Quota-gated actions return 402 QUOTA_EXCEEDED {feature,used,limit,upgradePlanCode}; per-file plan caps return 413 PLAN_FILE_LIMIT; the hard upload cap returns 413 FILE_TOO_LARGE which no upgrade lifts.
nodes.norm_label: quota error contract (402 quota_exceeded / 413 plan_file_limit / 413 file_too_large)

nodes.label: Role-aware upgradePlanCode
nodes.rationale: FREE individual → INDIVIDUAL_PRO, STARTER tenant → TENANT_GROWTH, top plan → null (no self-serve upgrade offered).

nodes.label: Barrel-split module pattern
nodes.rationale: Larger backend modules live as folders re-exported through a barrel at the original path (e.g. assessment.service.ts re-exports assessment/*), so imports stay stable.

nodes.label: Hard upload cap UPLOAD_MAX_MB = 120
nodes.rationale: Hard 120 MB upload cap kept in sync with nginx client_max_body_size 120m; oversized upload returns 413 FILE_TOO_LARGE.

nodes.label: F27: Orphaned account when register-with-join-code hits a full class
nodes.rationale: POST /auth/register creates the user before joinTenantByCode, so a seat-full join throws 402 after the account exists — leaving a plain INDIVIDUAL account and an unusable email. Fix is structural (validate join+seat before user create, or make create+join atomic).

nodes.label: F11: Stale session JWT role after admin role-change → 403s until re-login
nodes.rationale: On role change the live JWT still carries the old role; /auth/me updates stored user so the tenant UI renders but /tenant/* 403s. Fix is structural — force re-auth on role change or re-resolve role from DB on mismatch.
